commands.review_summary:
Adds native meta-skill parsing, cataloging, runtime invocation through `meta_invoke`, bundled meta skills, Skill Workshop creator routing, SQLite meta-run state, effective-tool inventory wiring, docs, and shrinkwrap repair changes.

PR surface: Source +6201, Tests +8038, Docs +291, Generated +144, Other +103. Total +14777 across 75 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: PR-head source shows full nested `AgentToolResult` values are returned as meta step output and then exposed through persistence and `meta_invoke` details. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
